Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipsFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.AuctionTooltips:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.MailboxTooltips:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AuctionTooltips, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.VendorTooltips:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.MailboxTooltips, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.EnchantTooltips:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.VendorTooltips, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ProspectTooltips:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.EnchantTooltips, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.MillTooltips:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ProspectTooltips, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.AuctionAgeTooltips:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.MillTooltips, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ShiftStackTooltips:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AuctionAgeTooltips, "BOTTOMLEFT")
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_TOOLTIPS_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_TOOLTIPS_TEXT; self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_AUCTION_TOOLTIP; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_MAIL_TOOLTIP; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_VENDOR_TOOLTIP; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ENCHANT_GENERIC_TOOLTIP; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_PROSPECT_TOOLTIP; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PROSPECT_TOOLTIP_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PROSPECT_TOOLTIP_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_MILL_TOOLTIP; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_MILL_TOOLTIP_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_MILL_TOOLTIP_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_AUCTION_AGE_TOOLTIP; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUCTION_AGE_TOOLTIP_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUCTION_AGE_TOOLTIP_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_STACK_TOOLTIP; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_STACK_TOOLTIP_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_STACK_TOOLTIP_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
